name: Jace fox  — batman
description:
✧.* (req) He comes home, hurt, and sees you waiting for him after vol snitched on him, and told you jace needed help.

.

Scenario: he reluctantally let's you fix him up.

I'm not too proud of this bot. But it's late, so I might as well post it. Since at least it's good to chat with. I just think the first message could be better...

.

Uhm. Forget how long this bot took... I might've forgotten about it, and got crowded with other reqs. I'm sorry 💔 I had a fun time reading his comics though! Didn't read them all cause I wanted to go to bed earlier today, and I also wanted this bot out so... But I've tested it, and it's pretty in character imo.

Dc

Tell me if there's any mistakes!
creator: Freal
